content.query:
-- CREATE MASTER KEY ENCRYPTION BY PASSWORD ='mitulrpatel@77'


-- CREATE DATABASE SCOPED CREDENTIAL hricrds
-- WITH IDENTITY = 'Managed Identity'
DROP EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE silver_source
CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE silver_source
WITH(
    LOCATION ='https://dwhhriday.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/',
    CREDENTIAL = hricrds
)

CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT parquet_format
WITH(
    FORMAT_TYPE = PARQUET,
    DATA_COMPRESSION = 'org.apache.hadoop.io.compress.SnappyCodec'
)

CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT delta
WITH(
    FORMAT_TYPE = DELTA
)

CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT parquet
WITH
(
    FORMAT_TYPE = PARQUET
);

CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE gold_source
WITH(
    LOCATION ='https://dwhhriday.dfs.core.windows.net/gold/',
    CREDENTIAL = hricrds
)
